reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y servicio. Un orgullo tener el ACA!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention and service. We're proud to have the ACA!

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros muy buena para criticar como pueden quedar 2 surtidores a las 21:00 por no pagar más empleados y además cierra la cafetería supuestamente es la mejor de Palermo la más grande que los dueños están podridos de vender combustible es una vergüenza que la marca ipf no haga nada

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants was very good, but it's a shame that only two pumps are open at 9 PM because they can't afford to hire more staff. And on top of that, the cafeteria, supposedly the best and biggest in Palermo, is closed. The owners are clearly fed up with selling fuel, and it's a disgrace that the IPF brand isn't doing anything about it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIcGFLZHN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros más boludos se pueden encontrar en esta estación. En vez de cargar simultáneo a 2 autos que comparten isla, cargan de a 1. Perdes promedio 15 minutos en cargar nafta. Nuevamente hacen lo mismo. Si pones un mono lo hace mejor.

(Translated by Google)
The most incompetent gas station attendants can be found here. Instead of filling up two cars simultaneously on the same pump, they fill up one at a time. You lose an average of 15 minutes filling up. They do the same thing again. If you put a monkey there, they'd do a better job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6bFlHdnJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
